bad-magic:true:header.magic: database magic is not SQLite format 3
truncated-header:true:database is shorter than the 100-byte header
partial-trailing-page:true:database has a partial trailing page
bad-page-kind:true:page.kind: unknown B-tree page type
bad-page-size:true:header.pageSize: page size must be a power of two from 512 through 65536
bad-read-version:true:header.readVersion: read version is not supported
bad-write-version:true:header.writeVersion: write version is invalid
bad-reserved-size:true:header.reservedBytes: usable page size must be at least 480
bad-payload-fractions:true:header.payloadFractions: payload fractions must be 64, 32, 32
bad-schema-format:true:header.schemaFormat: schema format must be between 0 and 4
bad-text-encoding:true:header.textEncoding: text encoding must be 1, 2, or 3 except for an empty format-0 schema
bad-header-reserved:true:header.reserved: reserved header bytes must be zero
bad-incremental-without-ptrmap:true:header.incrementalVacuum: incremental vacuum requires pointer maps
bad-freelist-head-count-pair:true:header.freelistHead: freelist head and count disagree
bad-header-page-count:true:logical database page count is inconsistent with file size
bad-fragmented-bytes:true:page.fragmentedBytes: fragmented free bytes exceed 60
bad-zero-content-offset:true:page.cellContentStart: zero cell-content offset is legal only for 65536-byte pages
bad-pointer-array-overlap:true:page.cellCount: cell pointer array and content area overlap
bad-cell-pointer:true:page.cellPointer: cell pointer is outside the cell-content area
bad-pointer-map-kind:true:pointerMap.kind: pointer-map kind is invalid
bad-pointer-map-parent:true:pointer-map relation disagrees with page ownership
bad-freelist-head:true:freelist page is outside the database
freelist-trunk-cycle:true:freelist trunk chain contains a cycle
freelist-too-many-leaves:true:freelist.trunk.leafCount: freelist trunk has too many leaves
freelist-duplicate-leaf:true:freelist contains a duplicate page
bad-record-serial-type:true:record.serialType: serial types 10 and 11 are invalid in a persistent database
bad-schema-type:true:sqlite_schema type is unknown
bad-schema-rootpage:true:page is outside the logical database
bad-schema-rootpage-negative:true:sqlite_schema rootpage must be non-negative
bad-page-freeblock:true:page.freeblock: freeblock chain is not increasing and in range
